summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard independently. Validator preflight requires #84325 to be quarantined as security-sensitive, so that exact PR is routed to central security handling. No close, merge, fix, or raise-PR actions are allowed by this job, and low-signal closeout is disabled, so all other outcomes remain non-mutating keep or targeted needs_human classifications.

actions.reason: Keep open for proof and maintainer review; no closure or fix action is allowed for this job.
